name: Future Reality Tree
description: Validate a proposed solution by tracing injections to desirable effects
systemPromptHint: Injections are specific, actionable changes — not vague wishes. Each injection should lead to at least one desirable effect through a clear causal chain. Look for negative branches: unintended consequences of injections that need trimming.

nodeTags.name: Injection
nodeTags.description: A proposed change or action to implement

nodeTags.name: Desirable Effect
nodeTags.description: A positive outcome you want to achieve

derivedIndicators.name: Foundation
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — a starting condition or injection point

derivedIndicators.name: Intermediate Effect
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges
